Impression of the question: Who is the prophet attributed with authorship of the book of Obadiah in Judaism and Christianity?  
Impression of the answer: Obadiah  
Impression of the context: The authorship is linked to a prophet who lived during the Assyrian Period and identified himself in the first verse.  
Impression of the structure: The question seeks the name of the prophet associated with the biblical book of Obadiah.  
Impression of the religious context: This information is relevant to both Judaism and Christianity.  
Impression of the historical period: The prophet is connected to the Assyrian Period.  
Impression of the textual clue: The prophet named himself in the first verse of the text.
